Paris| A radiant Simone Biles made her long-awaited Olympic return at theParis Gameson Sunday, drawing boisterous cheers and applause from an ecstatic, star-studded crowd in a performance that gave US gymnasts the lead in women‚Äôs qualifying.

After Biles‚Äô brilliance the US qualified with ease in first place, far ahead of second-placed Italy while China, Brazil, Japan, Canada, Britain, and Romania all booked their spots in Tuesday‚Äôs final.

title: Paris Olympics 2024: Lada Gaga, Ariane Grande, Anna Wintour and John Legend were among the celebrities on hand to see Simone Biles Olympic return.
description: Lady Gaga, Ariane Grande, Anna Wintour and even Baz Luhrmann were among the celebrities on hand to see Simone Biles‚Äô Olympic return.
